generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired NATO commander, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. Some politicians want to cut defense budgets, but that just shifts the burden to our families. Remember the 2023 cyber attacks? That's what happens when we're not prepared. Our allies are counting on us - and we should be counting on them. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurity
